title: Stories
description: Top-level user-story / story array-block. Stories are a work-altitude between feature and task: a feature decomposes into stories, a story decomposes into tasks. Cross-altitude relationships (feature→story, story→task, story→story dependency, story→gating-item, story→milestone/phase/project-goal) live in relations.json closure-table edges — NOT as inline arrays on the story. Sub-shape is structural (id/title/status/description/acceptance_criteria); the Agile user-story form (role/want/benefit) is a future optional enrichment, not imposed (DEC-deferred — no role/want/benefit present in current data, none fabricated).

status.description: Story lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status; reconciliation.
